title: The Secret Technology Behind Northrop’s B2 Stealth Bomber
summary: This interview excerpt discusses the theory that the B2 Stealth Bomber may utilize secret electrokinetic propulsion technology based on the Biefeld-Brown effect. The speaker suggests the B2's performance capabilities exceed what conventional propulsion would allow, implying classified technology transfer.

key_claims.claim: The B2 bomber's weight and propulsion dynamics would make it incapable of its credited performance figures without some additional boost to its capabilities
The B2 bomber may use electrokinetic wave propulsion based on the Biefeld-Brown effect at high altitudes
There may have been covert IP transfer into the B2 bomber program
